text: /init Set up a new Python CLI tool under MIT for processing invoices.

[Requirements]
Goal:           Scaffold boilerplate for a new Python CLI tool for processing invoices.
Inputs:         Empty repository plus the user's stated language, license, and project type.
Constraints:    Keep a Changelog format; never invent missing metadata.
Assumptions:    Author and long-form description may still require placeholders.
Open questions: None.

  Language: Python
  License:  MIT
  Type:     CLI tool
  Author:   [AUTHOR]
